message.content:
Search the codebase for any existing UI/frontend code:
1. Check if src/ui/ directory exists
2. Look for any React components (.tsx files)
3. Check for any Vite configuration (vite.config.ts)
4. Look for any @belt/tools usage
5. Check package.json for UI-related dependencies (react, deck.gl, blueprintjs)

Return a concise summary of what exists and what's missing.

content.text: I'll systematically search the codebase for UI/frontend code, checking each of your criteria.

file.content:
{
  "name": "@mms/system",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "format": "prettier --write",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "drizzle-kit migrate",
    "db:push": "drizzle-kit push",
    "db:studio": "drizzle-kit studio",
    "test": "bun test src/",
    "test:unit": "bun test src/ --grep -v 'integration'",
    "test:integration": "bun test src/**/*.integration.test.ts",
    "test:e2e": "bunx playwright test",
    "test:e2e:ui": "bunx playwright test --ui",
    "test:e2e:debug": "bunx playwright test --debug",
    "test:e2e:report": "bunx playwright show-report",
    "test:all": "bun test && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e",
    "demo:generate": "bun run src/demo/cli.ts",
    "demo:seed": "bun run src/demo/cli.ts --trains 128 --seed 20260121 --output drizzle/manual/seed_demo.sql"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@belt/tools": "0.1.2",
    "@blueprintjs/core": "6.1.0",
    "@blueprintjs/icons": "6.1.0",
    "@deck.gl/aggregation-layers": "9.2.5",
    "@deck.gl/core": "9.2.5",
    "@deck.gl/layers": "9.2.5",
    "@deck.gl/react": "9.2.5",
    "@hono/zod-openapi": "1.2.0",
    "@opentelemetry/api": "^1.9.0",
    "@opentelemetry/sdk-node": "^0.57.0",
    "@opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base": "^1.30.0",
    "@opentelemetry/semantic-conventions": "^1.28.0",
    "@types/pdfmake": "0.2.12",
    "bullmq": "^5.34.8",
    "chokidar": "5.0.0",
    "date-fns": "^4.1.0",
    "date-fns-tz": "^3.2.0",
    "drizzle-orm": "^0.44.0",
    "exceljs": "4.4.0",
    "hono": "4.11.4",
    "ioredis": "^5.4.2",
    "konva": "10.2.0",
    "papaparse": "5.5.3",
    "pdfmake": "0.3.3",
    "pino": "^9.6.0",
    "postgres": "^3.4.5",
    "prom-client": "^15.1.3",
    "react": "18.3.1",
    "react-dom": "18.3.1",
    "react-konva": "18.2.14",
    "uuid": "13.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.1",
    "@playwright/test": "1.57.0",
    "@types/bun": "1.3.6",
    "@types/chokidar": "2.1.7",
    "@types/node": "^24.10.1",
    "@types/papaparse": "5.5.2",
    "@types/react": "18.3.12",
    "@types/react-dom": "18.3.1",
    "@types/three": "0.170.0",
    "@types/uuid": "11.0.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^5.1.1",
    "drizzle-kit": "^0.30.5",
    "eslint": "^9.39.1",
    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^7.0.1",
    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.24",
    "globals": "^16.5.0",
    "typescript": "~5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.46.4",
    "vite": "^7.2.4"
  }
}

file.content:
import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'

/**
 * MMS Frontend Vite Configuration
 *
 * Dynamic Port Support:
 * - VITE_PORT=0 or unset: Random available port (default for dev)
 * - VITE_PORT=<number>: Use specific port (fallback to next available if busy)
 *
 * The actual assigned port is output in the Vite console.
 * Look for "Local: http://localhost:<port>" to get the actual port.
 */

// Default to port 0 (random) for development
const port = process.env.VITE_PORT !== undefined ? parseInt(process.env.VITE_PORT) : 0

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [react()],
  server: {
    port,
    strictPort: false,
    host: true,
  },
})
